sys_hub_flow.description: Steps to approve and fulfill NeedIt requests.
sys_hub_flow.label_cache: [{"name":"89529a53-b967-4a32-9a24-6890e96cc6c0.approval_state","label":"2 - Ask For Approval➛Approval State","reference_display":"Approval State","type":"choice","base_type":"choice","choices":[{"label":"-- None --","value":"","order":0.0},{"label":"Not Yet Requested","value":"not requested","order":1.0},{"label":"Requested","value":"requested","order":2.0},{"label":"Approved","value":"approved","order":3.0},{"label":"Rejected","value":"rejected","order":4.0},{"label":"Cancelled","value":"cancelled","order":5.0},{"label":"No Longer Required","value":"not_required","order":6.0},{"label":"Skipped","value":"skipped","order":7.0}],"usedInstances":{"3dd6817d-fd93-42db-8bc0-0b2d2d25c939":["condition"]},"attributes":{"element_mapping_provider":"com.glide.flow_design.action.data.FlowDesignVariableMapper"}},{"name":"Created_1.current.u_reference_2.manager","label":"Trigger - Record Created➛NeedIt Record➛Requested for➛Manager","reference":"sys_user","reference_display":"User","type":"reference","base_type":"reference","parent_table_name":"sys_user","column_name":"manager","usedInstances":{"89529a53-b967-4a32-9a24-6890e96cc6c0":["approval_conditions"]}},{"name":"Created_1.current","label":"Trigger - Record Created➛NeedIt Record","reference":"x_58872_needit_needit","reference_display":"NeedIt","type":"reference","base_type":"reference","usedInstances":{"ac2a855f-85bd-4b92-8846-c0d864fdc9d7":["record"],"89529a53-b967-4a32-9a24-6890e96cc6c0":["record"]},"attributes":{}},{"name":"ac2a855f-85bd-4b92-8846-c0d864fdc9d7.record","label":"1 - Update Record➛x_58872_needit_needit Record","reference":"x_58872_needit_needit","reference_display":"x_58872_needit_needit","type":"reference","base_type":"reference","usedInstances":{"17863ab4-7c60-4003-b98d-5f7860f57657":["record"]},"attributes":{"element_mapping_provider":"com.glide.flow_design.action.data.FlowDesignVariableMapper"}}]
